_comment: Hand-curated BIOS entries for cores that (a) genuinely require BIOS in MiSTer, (b) are NOT already in BiosDB, and (c) have a verifiable MD5 from a public DAT (MAME/MESS/No-Intro/Redump). Each entry must cite its source. Contribute additions via PR.

_schema.filename: EXACT filename MiSTer's core looks for (usually boot.rom / boot0.rom — NOT the BIOS's native name)
_schema.md5: lowercase hex MD5 hash of the correctly-renamed file
_schema.md5_source: where this hash came from (mame, no-intro, redump, mister-core-readme, etc.)
_schema.notes: what this BIOS is / when it's needed
_schema.required: true if core will not boot without this, false if optional
